events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need parse image: Evacuation decay test pump isolated. Microns @ isolation t=0 = 327. Microns @ t=10 min = 1880. So value is 10-minute reading 1880. Need diagnose decay behavior. In HVAC-R evacuation, standing decay test (isolation) should not rise more than certain microns over time, often <500 microns rise or manufacturer spec. Rise from 327 to 1880 in 10 min = 1553 microns rise. That indicates significant outgassing, moisture, or leak. System non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk? If moisture in system, can cause acid, compressor damage, etc. High. Work stage tested/inspected. Component conditions non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Need estimate overall progress. value 1880. confidence high 0.95. event_time 10.0. rate? Could compute rise rate 155 microns/min or maybe decay rate? Use rate = (1880-327)/10 = 155.3 microns/min. order empty. workable empty. findings: excessive micron rise during standing decay test; indicates moisture/outgassing or leak; evacuation non-compliant. actions: re-evaluate system integrity, perform leak detection, replace drier cores? Note cores removed. Re-evacuate to below 500 microns and repeat decay test; verify no leaks; install new filter-drier cores. references: EPA 608 (recovery/evacuation), mfr specs. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 80,
  "value": 1880,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 10.0,
  "rate": 155.3,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Micron level rose from 327 to 1880 microns in 10 minutes during isolated standing decay test",
    "Excessive decay indicates significant outgassing, moisture, and/or a leak in the evacuated system",
    "Evacuation does not meet acceptable standing decay criteria"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform leak detection on the isolated system and repair any leaks found",
    "Replace/install new filter-drier cores",
    "Re-evacuate the system to manufacturer-specified deep vacuum (typically <500 microns)",
    "Repeat standing decay test and confirm minimal rise over the required hold period"
  ],
  "rationale": "A proper standing decay test should show only a small, stable micron rise after pump isolation. A rise of over 1500 microns in 10 minutes indicates the system is not clean, dry, or tight, so the evacuation step fails and must be repeated after leak checking and drier service.",
  "references": [
    "EPA 608 - proper evacuation and recovery requirements",
    "OEM manufacturer evacuation specifications"
  ]
}
